subject: Spotlighter Role - Full Role Matrix & FE Integration
body:
## Full Role Matrix (Updated)

| Role | View | Edit |
|------|------|------|
| **Non-logged in** | All events | Nothing |
| **Milonguero** (logged in) | All events | Personal info/settings only |
| **Regional Organizer (RO)** | All events | Own events only |
| **Regional Admin (RA)** | All events | Any event in region |
| **System Admin/Owner** | All events | Any event anywhere |
| **Spotlighter** (NEW) | All events | **Spotlights only** (in area/mapCenter) |

---

## Spotlighter Role Details

- **Scope**: Area-based (uses mapCenter, changeable like RA regions)
- **Can do**: Add/remove spotlights (DJ, instructor, performer, band) on ANY event in area
- **Cannot do**: Edit event title, date, venue, description, etc.
- **Revokable**: Admin can revoke if abused

---

## BE Status (80% Ready)

**Already exists:**
- `PATCH /api/events/{eventId}/spotlights` — Spotlight add/remove endpoint
- `GET /api/userlogins/{firebaseUserId}/roles` — Roles for role-switcher

**I need to add:**
- `spotlighterInfo` field on userlogins
- Update permission check to recognize Spotlighter role
- Include 'Spotlighter' in roles response

---

## FE Changes Needed

**1. Add 'Spotlighter' to role-switcher dropdown**
- Only show if `spotlighterInfo.isApproved === true`

**2. Spotlighter Mode UI:**
- Show ALL events in area (read-only cards)
- Each event card has 'Edit Spotlights' button
- Opens spotlight editor (add DJ, instructor, performer, band)
- Calls `PATCH /api/events/{eventId}/spotlights`
- Hide edit/delete buttons (spotlight-only mode)

**3. API Call:**
```javascript
// Add spotlight
await axios.patch(`/api/events/${eventId}/spotlights`, {
  action: 'add',
  spotlight: {
    type: 'dj',  // or 'instructor', 'performer', 'band'
    name: 'DJ Carlos'
  }
});
```

---

## Key UX Point from Ybotman

Explicit mode switching is important — when in Spotlighter mode, user should ONLY see spotlight editing options. This 'safe mode' reduces risk of accidental changes.

—Fulton
